headline: Tenneco taps banks for planned stock market return
summary: Apollo Global Management, which acquired Tenneco in a deal valued at more than $7bn in enterprise value – paying $1.6bn in equity – is weighing up how best to monetise its holding.

headline: Apollo Hybrid Value Fund III Raises $6.5 Billion
summary: NEW YORK, May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apollo (NYSE: APO) today announced the final close of Apollo Hybrid Value Fund III (“HVF III”), raising approximately $6.5 billion in total commitments, reflecting strong support from both new and existing investors. The Fund attracted a diverse, global investor base, including pension funds, sovereign wealth funds, insurance companies, endowments and other institutional and wealth investors. headline: The AI race to IPO passes through PE portfolios
summary: Private equity portfolios have become the latest battleground for OpenAI and Anthropic, as both AI giants rush to grow their enterprise books ahead of potential IPOs. “PE firms sit on enormous portfolios of mid-market companies that need AI but lack the in-house engineering talent to build it,” said PitchBook senior PE analyst Garrett Hinds. “It is also a bet on owning the services layer of the AI stack, which is where the recurring revenue lives.” Anthropic announced Monday it had finalized a P
